name: Cream Cheese in Sour Dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Place the cream cheese, sour cream, chopped beef, grated cheddar cheese, and seasonings (garlic, tabasco) in a large bowl and mix well.
3. Add the chopped green onions and sprinkle with Lea-Perrins Sauce.
4. Scoop the mixture into a greased baking dish lined with the round sour dough bread loaf.
5. Cover with foil.
6. Bake for 45 minutes or until heated through, turning off the heat before serving.
